definitions: A detailed list of a shipment of goods in the form of a receipt given by the carrier to the sender.
A contract between the owner of the goods and the carrier.
examples: The Bill of Lading was signed by both parties.
We need the original Bill of Lading to release the cargo.
Check the Bill of Lading for any discrepancies.
